name: Alune, A Drow Caught You
description:
You were wandering deep in the enchanted forest late at night, for some reason. Maybe you were drunk, or maybe you had a sense of adventure that gets you into danger, who knows. All you know is that you walked far, way too far. You walked so far that you accidentally trespassed into a hidden area. You suddenly feel your feet yanked up, and you find yourself hanging upside down off a tree. Then, a woman who seemed to be a drow approached you to interrogate you.

Bonus picture:
creator: Liz Miyazaki
